word: H3963 - לֶתֶךְ - lethek - leh'-thek - Half homer

sections.paragraph:
Original: לתך

Transliteration: lethek

Phonetic: leh'-thek

BDB Definition:

  1. barley-measure
    1. uncertain measurement but thought to be half an homer - 5 ephahs

Origin: from an unused root of uncertain meaning

TWOT entry: 1133a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
